{{Card Infobox|Soot||2}}{{Keyword Infobox|Unplayable|2}}
{{C|Soot||2}} is an {{KW|Unplayable||2}} {{QueryLink|Cards|color:Colorless|Colorless|2}} {{QueryLink|Cards|rarity:Common&character:Colorless|Common|2}} {{QueryLink|Cards|type:Status&character:Colorless|Status|2}} Card. 

== Creating Soot ==
{{R|Biiig Hug||2}} adds a {{C|Soot||2}} to the player's draw pile when it is shuffled.

== Interactions ==
=== Synergies ===
As {{C|Soot||2}} is a {{QueryLink|Cards|type:Status&character:Colorless|Status|2}} card it interacts with the following:
* {{C|Compact||2}} will convert it into {{C|Fuel||2}}.
* {{C|Iteration||2}} will draw 2 cards when it is drawn if it is the first {{QueryLink|Cards|type:Status&character:Colorless|Status|2}} card drawn that turn.
* {{C|Flak Cannon||2}} will {{KW|Exhaust|exhaust|2}} it to deal damage.

== Update History ==
* '''Early Access v0.98'''
** Added Soot to the game.
